title: AI Companion Mod
description: Adds an interactable AI Companion to Minecraft
body:
## AI Companion
This mod adds a fully interactive AI-powered companion NPC to your Minecraft world, designed to observe, react to, and engage with the player in real time. Unlike static villagers or scripted companions, this character dynamically responds to what you do in-game. Craft dynamic, interactive story experiences-or just enjoy a responsive companion by your side as you explore.

## Core Features
### Dynamic AI Reactions
The companion continuously picks up on player actions such as movement, combat, building, exploration, and idle behavior. It comments on events as they happen, reacts to danger, celebrates achievements, and provides contextual responses that make gameplay feel more immersive and alive.

### Fully Customisable Character
Players can freely customise:
- Personality 
- Voice
- Skin / Appearance

### Voice-Based Interaction
The companion can both speak responses aloud using text-to-speech and respond to microphone input, allowing for dynamic live conversations without pausing to type in game.

## Configuration and Requirements
Requires an API Key from a supported AI provider in order to function. Checkout our website here for more information.
